India Rebuild Debate As Moeen Ali Dismisses Gautam Gambhir’s Claim

Dec 3, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

India Rebuild Debate Gains Momentum After 0–2 Home Whitewash

The recent 0–2 Test series defeat to South Africa has intensified discussions around an India rebuild, with critics questioning the team’s strategy and leadership. The conversation escalated further when former England all-rounder Moeen Ali publicly disagreed with head coach Gautam Gambhir’s claim that the team is merely in a transition phase.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 India Rebuild Debate As Moeen Ali Dismisses Gautam Gambhir’s Claim
